debug_info.goal:
Ω : Type u_1
E : Type u_2
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
inst✝¹⁴ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹³ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝¹² : CompleteSpace E
ι : Type u_3
inst✝¹¹ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝¹⁰ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝⁹ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝⁸ : OrderBot ι
inst✝⁷ : MeasurableSpace ι
inst✝⁶ : SecondCountableTopology ι
inst✝⁵ : BorelSpace ι
inst✝⁴ : MetrizableSpace ι
σ τ : Ω → WithTop ι
X : ι → Ω → E
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
inst✝³ : PartialOrder E
inst✝² : OrderClosedTopology E
inst✝¹ : IsOrderedModule ℝ E
inst✝ : IsOrderedAddMonoid E
hX1 : Submartingale X 𝓕 P
hX2 : ∀ (ω : Ω), RightContinuous fun x => X x ω
k : ι
hτk : ∀ᵐ (ω : Ω) ∂P, τ ω ≤ ↑k
hσ : IsStoppingTime 𝓕 σ
hτ : IsStoppingTime 𝓕 τ
⊢ stoppedValue X (τ ⊓ σ) ≤ᶠ[ae P] P[stoppedValue X τ|hσ.measurableSpace]

failed_attempts:
haveI : Approximable 𝓕 P := inferInstance
  let τn := hτ.discreteApproxSequence P
  let σn := hσ.discreteApproxSequence P
  refine ae_le_condExp_of_forall_setIntegral_le hσ.measurableSpace_le (hX1.integrable_stoppedValue hτ hτk)
    ((measurable_stoppedValue (fun ω ↦ (hX2 ω).adapted hX1.adapted) (hτ.min hσ)).aestronglyMeasurable)
    (fun s hs _ ↦ ?_)
  have h_int_τ : Integrable (stoppedValue X τ) P := hX1.integrable_stoppedValue hτ hτk
  have h_int_min : Integrable (stoppedValue X (τ ⊓ σ)) P := hX1.integrable_stoppedValue (hτ.min hσ)
    (hτk.mono fun _ h ↦ (min_le_left _ _).trans h)
  -- Convergence of the integrals
  have h_lim_τ : Tendsto (fun m ↦ ∫ ω in s, stoppedValue X (τn m) ω ∂P) atTop (𝓝 (∫ ω in s, stoppedValue X τ ω ∂P)) :=
    tendsto_setIntegral_of_L1' _ h_int_τ (fun _ ↦ hX1.integrable_stoppedValue _ (discreteApproxSequence_le_of_le hτk τn _))
      (tendsto_eLpNorm_stoppedValue_of_discreteApproxSequence_of_le hX1.to_martingale hX2 τn (discreteApproxSequence_le_of_le hτk τn))
  have h_lim_min : Tendsto (fun m ↦ ∫ ω in s, stoppedValue X (τn m ⊓ σn m) ω ∂P) atTop (𝓝 (∫ ω in s, stoppedValue X (τ ⊓ σ) ω ∂P)) :=
    tendsto_setIntegral_of_L1' _ h_int_min (fun _ ↦ hX1.integrable_stoppedValue _ (fun ω ↦ (inf_le_left).trans (discreteApproxSequence_le_of_le hτk τn _ ω)))
      (tendsto_eLpNorm_stoppedValue_of_discreteApproxSequence_of_le hX1.to_martingale hX2 _ (fun m ω ↦ (inf_le_left).trans (discreteApproxSequence_le_of_le hτk τn m ω)))
  -- Inequality for discrete approximations
  refine le_of_tendsto_of_tendsto' h_lim_min h_lim_τ (fun m ↦ ?_)
  exact setIntegral_le_setIntegral_of_ae_le_of_measurableSet hs
    (hX1.integrable_stoppedValue _ (fun ω ↦ (inf_le_left).trans (discreteApproxSequence_le_of_le hτk τn _ ω))).integrableOn
    (hX1.integrable_stoppedValue _ (discreteApproxSequence_le_of_le hτk τn _)).integrableOn
    (hX1.stoppedValue_min_ae_le_condExp_of_countable_range hX2 (discreteApproxSequence_le_of_le hτk τn m)
      ((hσ.discreteApproxSequence P).isStoppingTime m) ((hτ.discreteApproxSequence P).isStoppingTime m))
